raise-error.description: idempotencyKey header or payload field is required

when.expression: #[(vars.analysisRequest.filter.startTime default null) == null or (vars.analysisRequest.filter.endTime default null) == null]
#[((vars.analysisRequest.filter.limit default Mule::p('process.logs.defaultLimit')) as Number) > (Mule::p('process.logs.maxLimit') as Number)]

raise-error.description: Requested filter.limit exceeds max supported value
At least one source system must be provided
Duplicate idempotencyKey for active retention window

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- 'correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=orchestrateSources sources=' ++ (sizeOf((vars.analysisRequest.sourceSystems default []) as Array) as String)]

set-variable.value: #[(vars.sourceStatuses default []) ++ [{ sourceSystem: vars.currentSource, status: 'failed', retryCount: Mule::p('process.source.maxRetries') as Number, note: error.description default 'collection failure' }]]

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- 'correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=orchestrateSourcesDone partialResults=' ++ ((vars.partialResults default false) as String) ++ ' collectedCount=' ++ (sizeOf((vars.canonicalLogs default []) as Array) as String)]
#['correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=collectSourceLogs currentSource=' ++ ((vars.currentSource default 'unknown') as String)]
#['correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=collectFromAnypoint path=' ++ ((Mule::p('sys.anypoint.logsPath') default '/logs') as String)]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var filter = vars.analysisRequest.filter default {} --- { startTime: filter.startTime default null, endTime: filter.endTime default null, environment: filter.environment default null, severity: if (isEmpty(filter.severity default [])) null else ((filter.severity default []) joinBy ","), containsText: filter.containsText default null, correlationId: filter.correlationId default null, sourceHealthRequired: true, limit: filter.limit default Mule::p('process.logs.defaultLimit'), offset: filter.offset default null } filterObject ((value, key) -> value != null)

logger.message: #[output text/plain --- 'correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=collectFromAnypointResult kind=' ++ (if (payload is Array) 'array' else 'object') ]
#['correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=collectFromObservability path=' ++ ((Mule::p('sys.observability.logsPath') default '/logs') as String)]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var filter = vars.analysisRequest.filter default {} --- { startTime: filter.startTime default null, endTime: filter.endTime default null, environment: filter.environment default null, severity: if (isEmpty(filter.severity default [])) null else ((filter.severity default []) joinBy ","), containsText: filter.containsText default null, correlationId: filter.correlationId default null, sourceHealthRequired: true, limit: filter.limit default Mule::p('process.logs.defaultLimit'), offset: filter.offset default null } filterObject ((value, key) -> value != null)

logger.message: #[output text/plain --- 'correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=collectFromObservabilityResult kind=' ++ (if (payload is Array) 'array' else 'object') ]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json fun maskSecrets(value: String) = (value default "") // DataWeave regex replace uses $[n] (1-based) to reference capture groups. replace /(?i)(token|secret|password)\s*[:=]\s*[A-Za-z0-9._-]+/ with ($[1] ++ "=***") var sourceEntries = if (payload is Array) payload else if ((payload.entries default null) != null) payload.entries else [] --- if (vars.currentSource == "anypoint") sourceEntries map (item) -> { logId: (item.logId default item.id default uuid()) as String, timestamp: (item.timestamp default item.occurredAt default now() as String) as String, sourceSystem: "anypoint", serviceName: (item.serviceName default item.service default "unknown-service") as String, environment: (item.environment default item.env default vars.analysisRequest.filter.environment default "unknown") as String, severity: upper((item.severity default item.level default "INFO") as String), message: maskSecrets((item.message default item.text default "") as String), correlationId: (item.correlationId default item.correlation default correlationId) as String, dataClass: (item.dataClass default "internal") as String, redactionApplied: maskSecrets((item.message default item.text default "") as String) != ((item.message default item.text default "") as String) } else sourceEntries map (item) -> { logId: (item.logId default item.eventId default uuid()) as String, timestamp: (item.timestamp default item.ts default now() as String) as String, sourceSystem: "observability", serviceName: (item.serviceName default item.appName default "unknown-service") as String, environment: (item.environment default item.runtimeEnv default vars.analysisRequest.filter.environment default "unknown") as String, severity: upper((item.severity default "INFO") as String), message: maskSecrets((item.message default item.messageText default "") as String), correlationId: (item.correlationId default item.traceId default correlationId) as String, dataClass: (item.dataClass default "internal") as String, redactionApplied: maskSecrets((item.message default item.messageText default "") as String) != ((item.message default item.messageText default "") as String) }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- 'correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=normaliseLogs appended=' ++ (sizeOf((payload default []) as Array) as String) ++ ' total=' ++ (sizeOf((vars.canonicalLogs default []) as Array) as String)]
#['correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=buildSysControlPlaneSubmitBody localDraftJobId=' ++ ((vars.jobId default 'null') as String)]
#['correlationId=' ++ (correlationId as String) ++ ' step=sendControlPlane mockMode=' ++ (((Mule::p('sys.controlPlane.mockMode') default true) as Boolean) as String)]

raise-error.description: #["SYS control-plane call failed: " ++ ((error.description default "") as String)]
